name: AI Phone Answering
shortDescription: Answers calls 24/7 with your business name and has a real conversation with callers.
description: The flagship channel. Your AI receptionist answers every call with your business name, captures lead details, understands the nature of the work, assesses urgency, and escalates emergencies — all while you're on site.
capabilities: Captures lead details and job requirements
Escalates emergencies to you or our human team

name: AI Website Chat
shortDescription: Converts website visitors into leads without you lifting a finger.
description: A live chat widget on your website that engages visitors in real conversation, captures their details and requirements, and turns browsers into booked leads — without you needing to monitor it.

name: AI WhatsApp
shortDescription: Responds to WhatsApp messages instantly with a professional reply.
description: When customers message your business on WhatsApp — often with photos of their problem — the AI sends one professional reply acknowledging the enquiry, captures their details, and lets them know you'll be in touch.

name: AI SMS
shortDescription: Sends professional text message responses to enquiries.
description: When a potential customer texts your business number, the AI responds with one professional message, captures their details and the nature of the work, and confirms you'll be in touch.

name: AI Email
shortDescription: Acknowledges email enquiries with a professional first response.
description: Email enquiries receive an instant, professional acknowledgement. The AI captures the details from their message, assesses urgency, and lets the customer know you'll follow up personally.

name: AI Facebook Messenger
shortDescription: Handles Facebook business page messages and captures leads.
description: When potential customers message your Facebook business page, the AI responds instantly with a professional message, captures their details, and ensures you never lose a lead from social media.

name: AI Instagram DMs
shortDescription: Responds to Instagram direct messages and captures leads.
description: Contractors who showcase their work on Instagram attract enquiries via DMs. The AI responds instantly, captures the potential customer's details, and makes sure no lead slips through the cracks.

name: Missed Call Text-Back
shortDescription: Automatic safety net text when a call is missed.
description: The ultimate safety net. If a caller hangs up before the AI answers or the call disconnects, an automatic text is sent letting them know you're on a job and will be in touch — so they don't call a competitor.
capabilities: Automatic text when call is missed
Lets caller know you're busy on site
